---
title: "Week 2 Homework"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
---

::: exercise
Sigma notation review: Write the sum in expanded form:\
a. $\sum_{i=1}^5 \sqrt{i}$\
b. $\sum_{i=1}^n i^{10}$\
c. $\sum_{j=0}^{n-1} (-1)^j$\
d. $\sum_{j=n}^{n+3} j^2$\
:::

::: exercise
Sigma notation review:Write the sum in sigma notation:\
a. $1+2+3+4+5+6+ \cdots + 10$\
b. $2+4+6+8+ \cdots +2n$\
c. $1+x+x^2 + x^3 + \cdots +x^n$\
d. $1+2x+3x^2 + 4x^3 + \cdots +nx^{n-1}$\
:::

::: exercise
Factorial review: What is the factorial function? What notation is used
for this function?
:::

::: exercise
Factorial review: Calculate the following expressions using properties
of the factorial function.\
a. $\frac{7!}{3!}$\
b. $\frac{8!}{4!4!}$\
c. $\frac{10!}{9!}$\
d. $\frac{n!}{(n-2)!}$
:::

::: exercise
Sequence Review: Write the first five terms of the following sequences:\
a. $a_1=1$, $a_{n+1}=\frac{1}{1+a_n}$\
b. $b_1=0$, $b_2=1$, $b_{n}=b_{n-1}-b_{n-2}$\
c. $c_1=1$, $c_n=c_{n-1}+n$\
d. $d_1=1$, $d_n=2d_{n-1}$
:::

::: exercise
Sequence Review: Find a formula for the general term $a_n$ of the given
sequence:\
a. $\{1, 4, 7, 10, 13\cdots \}$\
b. $\{ -1, 2, -6, 24, -120 \cdots\}$\
c. $\{ 1, 4, 9,16, 25, \cdots\}$\
d. $\{ 0, 1, 3,7, 15, \cdots\}$
:::
